ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "total_iterations" INTEGER /* Total number of iterations in the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, paused) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification time of the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Number of the iteration within the simulation */,
  "active_agents" INTEGER /* Number of active agents in the iteration */,
  "energy_mean" REAL /* Mean energy level of the agents */,
  "cost_value" INTEGER /* Cost value associated with the iteration */,
  "walk_global" REAL /* Total distance walked globally by the agents */,
  "walk_global_departure" REAL /* Departure point for global walks */,
  "area_covered" REAL /* Area covered by the agents */,
  "reservoir_size_mean" REAL /* Mean size of the reservoir */,
  "regrow_delay_food_item" INTEGER /* Regrowth delay for food items */,
  "total_energy_consumed" REAL /* Total energy consumed by all agents in the iteration */,
  "total_resources_collected" REAL /* Total resources collected by all agents in the iteration */,
  "environment_state" TEXT /* JSON string to store the state of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_type" TEXT /* Type of the agent (e.g., explorer, gatherer) */,
  "initial_energy" REAL /* Initial energy level of the agent */,
  "initial_position_x" REAL /* Initial x-coordinate position of the agent */,
  "initial_position_y" REAL /* Initial y-coordinate position of the agent */,
  "max_energy" REAL /* Maximum energy capacity of the agent */,
  "last_seen_iteration" INTEGER /* The last iteration in which the agent was active */,
  "last_seen_position_x" REAL /* The x-coordinate of the agent's last known position */,
  "last_seen_position_y" REAL /* The y-coordinate of the agent's last known position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration */,
  "energy_level" REAL /* Energy level of the agent */,
  "distance_walked" REAL /* Total distance walked by the agent */,
  "resources_collected" REAL /* Total resources collected by the agent */,
  "area_explored" REAL /* Area explored by the agent */,
  "energy_consumed" REAL /* Energy consumed by the agent in the iteration */,
  "resources_spent" REAL /* Resources spent by the agent in the iteration */,
  "last_action" TEXT /* The last action performed by the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_performance_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_performance_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservoirs" (
  "reservoir_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservoir */,
  "reservoir_type" TEXT /* Type of the reservoir (e.g., food, water) */,
  "initial_size" REAL /* Initial size of the reservoir */,
  "location_x" REAL /* x-coordinate location of the reservoir */,
  "location_y" REAL /* y-coordinate location of the reservoir */,
  "max_size" REAL /* Maximum capacity of the reservoir */,
  "last_replenished" TEXT /* Last time the reservoir was replenished */,
  "depletion_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the reservoir depletes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservoir_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservoir_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "reservoir_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservoir */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration */,
  "size_change" REAL /* Change in the size of the reservoir */,
  "new_size" REAL /* New size of the reservoir after the change */,
  "replenishment_amount" REAL /* Amount of replenishment if any */,
  "replenishment_source" TEXT /* Source of replenishment (e.g., natural, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservoir_changes_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservoir_changes_reservoir_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservoir_id") REFERENCES reservoirs ("reservoir_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* To indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* To indicate if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter value (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* To indicate if the parameter is required for the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
